compiled_state.title: Figma design collaboration: Pull validation via perceptual diff
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Context

The Pull (API + Merge) epic gives the implementation agent a structured, merged manifest reflecting designer revisions. After implementation, there is no automated way to verify the implemented UI matches the Figma design. This epic adds post-implementation fidelity validation: Figma frames exported as PNG via REST API, Playwright screenshots of implemented routes, perceptual diff scoring to quantify visual match.

## Success Criteria

1. Validation exports Figma frame as PNG via REST API (GET /v1/images/:key, scale=1), using rate-limit-aware client (check lastModified before re-exporting, 3-5s delay between requests)
2. Playwright captures screenshot at same viewport as Figma export (default 1440x900, configurable via design.figma_viewport), with networkidle + 500ms settle delay
3. Perceptual diff (pixelmatch, threshold 0.1) produces Design Fidelity Score (matching pixels / total pixels x 100); score and highlighted diff image written to design artifacts directory
4. Score below threshold (design.figma_fidelity_threshold, default 85) → story tagged design:fidelity_gap and surfaced in sprint reports; score at or above → tagged design:fidelity_verified
5. If Playwright not installed or REST API returns 429, logs warning with remediation guidance and skips scoring; creates advisory ticket to track skipped validation; never blocks story closure

## Scenario Analysis

Derived from Pull epic's 16 surviving scenarios. Key validation-specific risks: Playwright screenshot timing (mitigation: networkidle + settle delay), resolution mismatch (mitigation: normalize viewport), threshold miscalibration (mitigation: configurable per project, default 85), silent fidelity skip in CI (mitigation: advisory ticket created).

## Dependencies

- Pull API + Merge epic (6863-7b38)
- Figma PAT with file_content:read scope (same as Pull API+Merge)
- pixelmatch npm package
- Playwright (optional — degrades gracefully)

## Approach

Rate-limit-aware REST API client for PNG export with caching. Resolution-normalized comparison. Graceful degradation ensures validation never blocks story closure. Configurable threshold with calibration guidance.

### Planning Intelligence Log

- **Web research**: triggered (shared with Push/Pull research; uimatch architecture informed design)
- **Scenario analysis**: triggered (derived from Pull epic scenarios)
